title: GigaToken: ~1000x faster Language model tokenization
summary: GigaToken 是一个旨在将语言模型分词速度提升约1000倍的开源项目。它通过优化算法和实现，显著加速了文本到token的转换过程，这对于大规模语言模型的训练和推理效率有重要影响。项目提供了Python接口，易于集成到现有工作流中。
summary_en: GigaToken is an open-source project aiming to accelerate language model tokenization by approximately 1000x. It significantly speeds up the text-to-token conversion process through optimized algorithms and implementations, which is crucial for the efficiency of large-scale language model training and inference. The project provides a Python interface for easy integration into existing workflows.
